synopsis: While piloting the *Millennium Falcon* through space, Luke Skywalker's mind flashes back to his life on Tatooine. Luke, Biggs Darklighter, Deak, and other youngsters race their T-16 skyhoppers through the twisting maze of Beggar's Canyon when a wounded scout arrives to warn of an impending Sand People attack. While the others try to hold off the raiders, Luke and Biggs rush to warn the area's other residents. Biggs is wounded by a Tusken Raider, and Luke must fly him through the dangerous caverns of Diablo Cut in his skyhopper to get him to safety.
title: Star Wars (1977) #17: Crucible
